name: worldgen-site-distribution
description: Measures spatial distribution of sites placed by the worldgen pipeline across N independent T1 sessions. Each run fires a fresh POST /narrate with a unique seed, extracting site_placement_log from the T1 response.

request_template.action: I wake up in an unfamiliar land.

edge_topology._note: WorldGen.js generateTerrainPatch uses dx=-3..+3, dy=-3..+3 (7x7 patch, radius=3). If patch size changes, update radius here.
